metadata.description: Comprehensive engineering skills. Tracker-agnostic (GitHub / Jira / local docs), language-agnostic.

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: One plugin, 13 skills: align → build → test → review → verify → finish, with debug and improve as reflexes. Right-sizes to the change; the everyday skills chain automatically. Works with GitHub, Jira, or local markdown, and any language.
